description: The Bramble & Bear sleepsuits are made from organic cotton, providing a soft and gentle fabric for your baby’s delicate skin. Organic cotton is grown without harmful chemicals making it hypoallergenic and a natural, skin-friendly choice. Using organic cotton also helps save precious water, produces less CO2 and is kinder to our planet. Our quick double zip design makes changing effortless while easy-care fabric ensures your baby's clothing can be kept fresh.
